description: Style NoteCut a dash with these shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Inspired by the rugged Texas plains and the cowboy lifestyle from a bygone era, these leather shoes pay homage to the Wild West. Wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish leather jacket.Product DetailsBrown slip-on with high quality leather upper and reinforced overlays High on ankle for style with elasticated gussets on the sides, has a pull loop at the heel collarPadded innerUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with patterned lugs and an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeatherClean with a neat dry clothDo not store under sunlight
